reviews.review_text:
The best layout and spacing of any of the Lakes Entrance caravan parks and a great location that's pretty well separated from neighbours.

Some of the electric BBQs were on the fritz and community kids room was closed, otherwise it would be an easy 5 stars!
Stayed 4 nights on an ensuite site. Park is about 5 min drive from the main street however there is a walking path accessible from the park. Close the Eastern Beach.

We found this place by chance.
We had i tended to stay at another tourist park but they were closed with only  mon-fri office hours. (Great for tourists..NOT) Soo. We then found Eastern Beach...and so pleased we did.  We just called in to check availability...of a powered site and our 3 dogs
What a lovely spot. The receptionist with Pink hair (sorry didnt catch her name) was lovely and informative... helpful and onliging..
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay...

We had a lovely stay here overall. The location is definitely a highlight—just a few minutes from the beach and it doesn’t feel overly crowded like some caravan parks, which made the experience more relaxing, especially with a young family.

Our son absolutely loved the playground and the jumping pillow, which kept him entertained the whole time—definitely a big win for families.

That said, there are a few areas that could use improvement. Some parts of the park could benefit from better cleaning and maintenance, particularly the bins and the laundry area (especially the back section), which felt a bit neglected.

Overall, it’s a great spot for the location and family-friendly facilities, but a bit more attention to cleanliness would make the stay even better.
We have stayed in this park several times and it is easy access to surf beach and park is good for families   We travel with caravan so haven’t checked out cabins
Excellent NRMA
Awesome park. Huge sites. Friendly staff. Clean and tidy. Plenty to keep the kids amused
Great clean and quiet park, close to shops and beach

Stayed in a powered caravan site.  Clean amenities.  Big, clean showers with good water pressure.  Camp kitchen has pizza ovens and a help yourself herb garden.  Easy walk to eastern beach and path into town.  Loved it.  Highly recommended!
Great camp site, good size, roomy ensuite, very quiet.
Great park with lots for families. Was full every night we were there but still quiet. Sites are big enough but not over generous so good reversing needed as most cars parked along road side.

Unfortunately the management of this place has completely failed to meet any expectations. I haven’t been to this park in two years and this year’s visit was a complete disappointment. There was vomit in the women’s toilet sink for an entire day, two soap dispensers were not filled for over two days leaving the toilet completely without soap. The toilets and showers were filthy for my entire week stay and I don’t believe they were cleaned more than once a day, even though the park was at capacity. There was human poo on a toilet seat for a few hours, multiple toilets were clogged. The reception staff were rude, there were no children’s activities or movie nights, the food vans were cancelled, when raised with reception who couldn’t care less they said NRMA were to blame for cutting their budget. There was no vibe in the park, everyone complained about the lack of cleanliness and unfortunately my stay was well below expectations, especially in comparison to previous years. We won’t be back and will be finding an alternative caravan park.

What a disappointment this Caravan Park became in the end… Park itself is great, layout, facilities and cleanliness, however no one respects the 10pm quiet curfew and it’s loud late into the night. (Mainly teenagers… hard when you have small children trying to sleep) Cars and people come and go at all hours… On our last day during the day I observed teenagers throwing tennis balls at a young family’s tent, and then late at night I happened to walk past and again observe the same teenagers throwing water at that same family’s tent. What an appalling disgrace these young men and women were. How disrespectful. I did see security wandering late that night and alerted them to the fact.  We were contemplating staying an extra couple of nights when we arrived as the location and  beach is so great, but we wont even consider coming back at all in the future nor would we recommend.
The bathroom and shower smells very bad and dirty. Not  recommend
Great park close to town walk or pushing ride close to beach and river

Enjoyed our stay in a dog friendly cabin at NRMA Eastern Beach recently. Lovely clean cabin in a nice location next to the water. The park offers a range of accommodation operations to suit most people. Facilities were clean and tidy and staff were welcoming. Will definitely return for another visit soon.

The location was close to the beach and the cabin was very spacious and well set out, however it was disappointing. We realised later that we hadn’t been given the cabin we actually booked, but we weren’t advised of this change. Overall it wasn’t very clean.  The dishes we got out of the cupboard were dirty. The oven tray was especially dirty and after scrubbing that and preparing our food to cook we discovered that the oven didn’t work which was quite inconvenient.The shower curtain was short so water went everywhere around the toilet and there was a squeegie mop there to scrape it away. Advised reception on leaving of the problem with the broken oven and was just told no problem and don’t worry about it. Also wrote feedback later to point out that we had not got the cabin we booked but didn’t receive any response. Our review through Boooking dot com, which they requested, was never published. Most places we stayed on a 3 week road trip were better maintained and less expensive. Won’t trust those reviews again.
Great spot. A little untidy tho

A very organised park clean
Amenities  and friendly staff
We had used powered campsite at NRMA Eastern beach holiday park, so not able to comment on rooms.

A very pleasant surprise!  After some less than exciting cabins on this trip, this experience was greatly appreciated.  Very clean, tidy, warm, value for money and well resourced.  Beds for five, two AC’s, and plenty of storage.  The BBQ on the balcony was a bonus but didn’t get hot enough we thought.  Anyway, a nice way to finish off the five week holiday before heading home.  |Really enjoyed the warm welcome from the young lady at reception.  |Thank you guys.
Great park. Close to beach. Short drive to shops. Great for kids. Very clean. Reception staff very friendly

Great value and family friendly with plenty for the kids to do and play on. Awesome staff very helpful with extending my stay. Great grass powered sites even for tents. Very clean facility's and awesome water pressure in the showers 🚿.  Enjoyed my stay and had easy access to town and water front with a short drive from the park. Would highly recommend staying there with the family or whatever your travel set up is .

If you are looking for a caravan park just out of Lakes Entrace this is it. The NRMA Eastern Beach CVPark is well maintained, good space, clean, friendly family environment and dog friendly too. The sites are roomy and the layout well thought out. Facilities are pretty good with fun activities and different sorts of mobile food trucks coming daily and the coffee cart daily as well. Very close walk to beautiful surf beach, nice walking tracks, and easy to get into town, where there is enough to fill your holiday activity quota. The price is pretty good too. We can recommend this caravan park for long or short stay, cabin, van, caravan or powered/un-powered tent sites. You can relax while the kids ride bikes scooter around, jump on the air pillow, swing or play on playground equipment, also has a great camp kitchen and laundry facilities too. Be prepared to get bugged about money for the claw machines (eh!). Be great if there was more of a games room like table tennis, pool table or other free type games for kids. (As there is only small  TV room with books and kids drawing stuff) although there is a pool. Overall it's easy to book a site, definitely do the self check in for a smooth fast entry to the grounds. Have fun!

We stayed in a cabin at this park.
Beautifully  appointed and really roomy and modern. Comfortable  bed and lovely bathroom .Had everything that you could possibly  need. I would strongly  recommend  either overnight or longer..
Very reasonable rates.

We stayed here in August '25 for a two nights.  Stayed on a powered ensuite site (site 6).  The site was a very generous size with plenty of room for our little teardrop camper with awnings out both sides and back, and plenty of room for the car to park at front.  The ensuite was in very good condition.  The park was nice and quiet at night, but it was a quiet time to be there.  The beach is walking distance.  The park is about a 5 minute drive from the main strip at Lakes Entrance.  There were a couple of camp kitchens.  The one closest to us was closed for the winter season, so it was a little walk to the main camp kitchen for cooking/dishes etc.  The main amenities were also very clean and well kept.  Overall, we enjoyed our stay and would definitely return.
Very clean and tidy excellent place we had access’s ability cabin, very comfortable bed and spacious accommodation. Very friendly staff quiet location would recommend to anyone.

Great modern villa if you don’t mind being away from the motel strip. Clean and tidy. Good size. Comfy bed. Double had electric blanket which was good. Two single beds didn’t which was a shame. Split system in lounge not enough to warm bedrooms. |Very quiet!
Comfortable and safe park. Staff were lovely.
Nice clean cabins where car can be parked besides the cabin. It is a great way to take a break in the country side. We stayed a night here on our driving holiday from Sydney to Melbourne.
Caravan 🚐 spaces are quite large. Very clean amenities  close to the beach ⛱️. Staff very friendly and helpful.

Stayed in a cabin in a Riverside Cabin for 1 night.
A cold, wet, windy day but the heating was already switched on, the TV playing the AFL match of the day, and the cabin was immaculate.
Such a good experience and possibly the best we have ever stayed in. Friendly staff and ideally placed in Lakes Entrance.
Great value.

It was a very mixed bag for us!! The
and I feel we were just unlucky and once receptionist and cleaner knew they really did try and help.
These things happen and it did not impact on our two day stay in Lakes Entrance.
Great place to stay clean tidy amenities are very clean as well

Great staff. Great facilities. My one star review overall for the park is this photo. Why should I have to pay money for cleaning and be expected to take the rubbish out and do the dishes or be threatened with additional costs? When i am paying for the cleaning. I have a huge problem with this. Unfortunately I disagree with this so strongly that I can only give one star overall

Stayed in our own van so can't rate the rooms.Powered sites very big. Excellent park right near the beach and 20 minute walk to shops. Shower area had a heater so you don't freeze getting out of shower. Lovely modern amenities. Showers hot and great pressure. Highly recommend this park

Good clean and friendly site. Only issue we had was when they cleaned the toilets and showers, they closed ALL toilets including the disabled at the same time. We had 2 particular days when the toilets were closed for about 20 minutes. Okay for most adults, but when most kids need to go, they need to go. Leave the disabled toilet open whilst you clean the larger toilets. Happy to wait in line.

We camped here for two nights and had a great time! Not only is the campsite within walking distance to the beach and directly next to a path that you can take all the way into the centre of the town, there’s also so much wildlife around that it makes it a lovely place to be! The toilets and showers were super clean and close by to the camping spot and the actual campsite itself was easily accessible and really cosy, with luscious grass and some trees. They also have a small kitchenette area available that has some cooking amenities available which makes it easy to cook any meals if you forget some gear. Thanks for having us!!
Friendly staff and great location 👍

On arrival was told that all
Check in information had been provided via email, admin staff responded that they had not yet sent via email.
Rubbish bins on many occasions were over flowing and needed to be emptied daily rather than every few days, particularly with the school holidays. Amenities cleanliness was poor in both the ladies and the men’s. hair clumps stuck in the drain in the ladies showers, and still there three days later despite daily cleaning. With the amount of people booked into the park, amenities needed to be spot checked through out the day. Men’s amenities had dirt on the shower partitions that were not removed.
Park wifi not working and no updates provided during a five night stay.
Laundry had four washing machines and two dryers. Dryers were both out of order. Camp kitchen had plenty of fridges and BBQs. Kids playground, jumpy pillow and swimming pool were great.
Dog friendly park, no dog poo bags provided as other NRMA parks provide.

Very peaceful location and the staff are very friendly
Can't give 5 stars because of the poor facilities, please update them and build another block
Great park, very tidy with level sites and great amenities. Easy access to parks and beach. Will be returning.

Great park, superb friendly girls in reception. Nice level grassy site close to immaculate amenities.  Beaut pool & a jumping pillow for the kids. Level walk or cycle to town. Walk to beach & golf course.
The park has clean amenities and is very family friendly.
Loved it

Nice park but powered site were to close together packed in like sardines, you could hear your neighbours talking lol, sites are all different sizes regardless of size of RV, yet over the river side of the park there was ample space. Not sure why they put everyone together and not spaced out. On saying that the facilities are very good, camp kitchen is one of the best I've seen. The short walk to the beach is lovely.

A really nice park just out of town. Easy walking to the beach and it sounds like people were catching prawns and fish in the creek behind. ||Great facilities, I had a little difficulty getting my van into the site but I’m also a novice. ||We were met with an unwelcoming  person at reception however that did not spoil our trip. ||Met some lovely people staying there and would recommend staying here over a number of other parks in town

The cabins look amazing, not sure inside as we have our own van. The location is perfect away from the main street hassles and a great walk to the beach just up the road. Staff are extremely friendly and helpful. Great place and very pet friendly

Friendly and efficient staff at check-in. Located easy walk to Eastern Beach and well laid out and nice pool. We had a “ water view” cabin , which is a small river and close to a bike/ walking track which was busy and probably took away some out our privacy. Comfortable cabin and nice big bathroom. We enjoyed our stay and exploring Lakes Entrance.
Beautiful area, close to beach. Fair walk in to town.
Great caravan park. Amenities great. Staff very friendly. Short walk to the beach.
Nice camp very close to the 90miles beach 🏖️
Schön gelegener Campingplatz, saubere Waschräume. Die Campingküche war leider sehr schmutzig.

Emplacement is great; Caravan Park close to the beach and bike ride to the town. Large camping site. However the toilets and showers not very cleaned. Kitchen is spacious but there are no ustensile.
No shade in the kids playground either.

Convenient location, great facilities, close to the beach and family friendly. We stayed for 4 nights and had a great time.  The pool was great. Heated and super clean.
We stayed in a Waterview Villa. The kitchen and bathroom were a little older looking but totally functional. Overall a great experience,  would definitely stay here again.

Visited in September 2024, great experience , big site, lovely service & information from staff and great dog walks nearby!
What an amazing camp kitchen and lounge area!

Returned in November 2024 for a week, very happy again. Booked for October 2025…
Nice park close to the beach, walk to shops, great amenities block and friendly staff.

Was here when NRMA were raising funds for Camp Quality  & brilliant fun ,Sausage Sizzle ,morning coffee & raffle ticks with lots of donated great prizes.
Beautiful, helpful staff.

Great place to say in lake entrance. We tried both cabin (lake view) and the campsite. Loved the campsite more, very strategic placed when you have small children, the camp is surrounding the play area. Love the pizza oven too!

Powered site good value. Good layout of park. Pool was heated eg not freezing.
Bins were too far away not even one in the camp kitchen.  Mixer shower taps (rare to find.lol) but on just hot the female shower was warm but not hot.
Lots of spider webs in skylight above showers. Otherwise still recommend

Great park right near the water, we had an ensuite site which was spacious and had a little cupboard. Site was spacious and had a green mat. Camp kitchen was a bit sparse, a stove top would be useful but it was all clean. Really friendly staff, pool wasn’t freezing. Playground was pretty basic but jumping pillow excellent. Location right on a little inlet was the highlight and we could walk to the beach. Would definitely return.

I’d like to give a five-star review because Liz, the staff member I interacted with, was incredibly helpful. As a first-time camper, I found her support invaluable. She made my booking process smooth and patiently answered all my questions with professionalism. Her warmth really set a positive tone for my day, and I can’t wait for my camping experience at NRMA Eastern Beach Holiday!
Easy parking caravans on sites
Was great. Awesome shower heads.

Friendly staff. Great rooms with big beds. Great for kids. Only downside, they ask you to remove all rubbish bags, wash/dry/put away all crockery you use. I have never had a hotel/motel ask that ever. I'm paying them. They aren't paying me.

stayed in the access friendly banksia villa with my elderly parents. the room was clean, equipped with all you need for a comfortable stay. I really love the welcome letter addressing my name. this kind of little touches actually goes so far in showing how you strive for a superior level of customer care.

online pre check in was easy which sped up the actual check in. friendly face at the Reception.

location as a whole is good, although my elderly parents struggle to enjoy the surroundings as it is actually not that near to any views or beaches. but the vibe was very serene and calm and we loved the sunset colours when we were there.

the only slight let down is the poor WiFi, which didn't really affect me but I imagine would for international visitors like my parents.

all in all - impressive layouts of cabin that was comfortable and clean.

When we stay here it's normally  in our camper trailer. We called in on Monday  26th august  to book a site for the long weekend in Nov (Melbourne cup) and there weren't too many sites left which is great for the park. The site we picked is the same site my husbands family  used to stay on when he was a kid some 50 odd years ago. He went down memory lane there for a bit. The park is close to the ninety mile Beach 🏖 and the golf course ( where my husband  lives when we holiday  here at Eastern Beach caravan Park).
They even upgraded us to and ensuite site 2 nights 62.00 all up will be back again
Very close to the beach
The only problem  was the showers.  There is no dry area to get dressed.  Wet floor.
First, overnight stop in our "new to us" van. Great facilities! Thank you.

Stayed on a business trip. Couldn't get hot water in the shower the 1st morning found the switchboard had tripped. Flicked safety switch everything worked again after my cold shower. That night lights kept flicking the switch then TV's would not work so went to bed early. Didnt know who to contact as reception was closed. Next morning had to turn off everything to get hot water for the shower. Reception told told me it had never happened before but no compensation for an uncomfortable stay. Sorry won't be returning 😑
A nice park with plenty of features, very clean and modern amenities, close to the beach and walks but the town centre is quite a ways away way, good if you have a bike or car.

Stayed 2 nights
Lovely and quiet.
Close to creek and beach.
Ensuite was clean but very dated. Door needs attending to as it kept sticking and the lock was hard to engage.
Easy walk to town Cente
Staff in office very grumpy no entertainment for the kids tv room locked after hours

Schön gelegener Campingplatz, leider total ungepflegt. Die Küche war mittags schon schmutzig und heute 8:30 noch ekeliger! Nichts geputzt. Da sind wir sonst einen anderen NRMA Standard gewohnt. Auch die Duschräume sind dreckig, man muss eben nicht nur den Boden wischen, sondern vielleicht auch mal nach oben schauen, dreckige Filter, Spinnweben usw. Wir können nur empfehlen, fahrt wo anders hin.

Lovely camp with large grassy sites, modern camp kitchen and nice showers etc. Close to river and beach and if you like walking its 1.8k to town and there is a nice 5k loop from the bridge. For a day trip try Raymond Island around 30kms where Koalas live in the residential streets 🐨
Have just stayed here & really enjoyed it. The accessible cabin is easy to get around in. The bathroom is fantastic, highly recommend it!

One of the busiest parks I have stayed in, and they do it very well.
Pet friendly, the park is.minutes walk from the beach and a short stroll to shops if needed. Facilities well maintained.
Good large sites level and grassy.
Only spent a night but it was a fabulous spot with great camp kitchen, clean amenities and close for a walk to the beach. Also dog friendly

Park is well set up for vans and motorhomes. HOWEVER, 3 cubicles in mens toilets for 50 or 60 vans is really poor. Two mornings, only 2 cubicles available, as one closed for maintenance. Should not have to queue for a toilet in a van park.
Seems to have enough showers.
Overall a good park.

I have stayed at the NRMA Eastern Beach Holiday Park twice and enjoyed it both times. The waterfront villas are well located and well equipped in general. They are quite quiet, spacious and the beds are very comfortable.
The kitchens are a bit dated, and could do with more kitchen utensils and equipment (coffee maker, cutlery, crockery etc)

We had a powered site for our van, the ground was uneven, made it hard to get camper set up, the new block of showers is great exept for the shower!! You cannot adjust the head, so you get blasted in the face with cold water!! Everything else was great

Great activities for the kids. Location a little further from town than some of the other parks. Plenty of communication during our stay (via text) unfortunately though some was not correct which caused some confusion re check in and other kids activities. Busy time of year and pool wasn't too over crowded.
Hired a powered site. Has taps to use for water to campsite. If you have a caravan. Camper or taller sites are good sizes.

Great service, location and experience all round
Staff were fantastic
Too many dogs. Faeces left on lawns

Stayed on a powered sight for the Australia day weekend. The kids had a fantastic time splashing in the pool and jumping on the bouncing pillow. The playground is great for smaller children. Amenities at the park were fantastic.
This park is also fantastically located with a patrolled beach a short 5 minute walk away.

Perfect location, most importantly Great staff well I dealt with a male who's name I can't remember. They did movie night n other kids activities which is great. Pizza oven installed, Only drawback of this park I noticed is below average kitchen.  Had no tools at all, no bins in kitchen which is inconvenient, I think labour saving hack may b . Over all pleasant experience

Absolutely loved this caravan park. We stayed here for two weeks and had a powered site near the river. It was nice and quiet on our side even though it’s during a peak season. We would fall asleep listening to the ocean waves. The other side near the pool was more crowded which is not our cup of tea. I highly recommend either booking good spot in advance or come when it’s not peak. Overall I think it’s the best park in town since it’s tucked away in a less busy location and right next to the ocean.

We stayed here on a powered site and had everything you needed and a good size. Plenty of things for the kids to do over the school holidays and a short walk into town. The staff were great and friendly and helped with any questions we had.
Great place to spend with kids
Just keep going back because we can't get enough of it,

The facilities such as the pool and the jumping pillow close at an unreasonable time. They close at 6 when it’s day light savings and they have nothing else to do when u are here when these 2 facilities are closed.

After waiting on hold for over 10mins, finding out they do indeed have avalibility, starting the booking process and then be told they are not pet friendly like their website does say; was very disappointing.
Do not state you're pet friendly all over your website if you are not!
Need bit more cleaning frequency in toilets during Christmas holidays..great location..
Best park in lakes great staff

My boyfriend and I stayed in one of the water villa cabins and we could not be happier with the service and amenities provided! The reception is super friendly and accommodating. Everything is super clean & modern. There are great heaters located in every room to make winter camping more comfortable. The master bedroom even had a heated mattress pad and phone chargers provided. The rooms are very spacious which is great for couples or parents with kids.

We were surprised to find free Kit Kats, popcorn, hot chocolate, water bottles and milk in the fridge provided to us! We had a lovely stay and would definitely come again.
Close to the beach and plenty for the kids to do. There was mould stains on the sheets, and we had to make our own beds in the second room.
Very good
Plenty of room good facilities and well maintained. Beach nearby

While not in the cbd this place is so quiet and peaceful.just a 5 minute drive from town but a world away for peace and quiet.the cabins are very comfortable and we had a lovely outlook to the water.|The rooms are nicely decorated. |While value is similar to staying in motels here you get a quiet and peaceful time.|We would encourage visitors to  look at these holiday parks for excellent value and a more outdoor experience
Great friendly service and with a smile. Very happy to help you.
Great place to stay for families or travellers. Cabin was beautiful, large, very nice.
We had a family villa. Well appointed and spacious. Nice pool and play area for the kids. Short stroll to Eastern beach.

This is our second time here.
Great place
Just a walk behind the caravan park.
Dog friendly
Very friendly staff

We had an amazing long weekend away here. The facilities were incredible for the size of the campsite. It was booked to capacity when we stayed but even then it didn't feel overly crowded or busy. The kids had a great time and were kept busy with the movie night with free popcorn, the fairy floss and slushies as well as the temporary tattoos they had sprayed on. The kids loved taking the go karts for a spin, the bouncing pillow and the pool area. All well kept and clean. Thanks for great memories!

Junkies having a brawl on Eastern Beach Rd, jumped into the campsite pulled my tent strings shaking the tent and scared my new born baby. about 100 people partying on East Beach and walking down the road all night causing trouble, fighting and yelling. No security cameras on main road near the campsites only entry and exit. wouldn’t stay here if you’re not trying to get out of the tent at 3am and have to fight junkies off. Reception didn’t offer to move me or a refund when i told them we literally had people jump the fence shaking our tent. 100% never staying at NRMA eastern beach again in my lifetime.

Great kids play area , super good service
And well stocked reception, excellent facilities bbqs etc.  large sites for caravans. Loved the beach close by for fishing and lake tyres close by.
Super friendly and helpful staff. Nothing was too much trouble. Highly recommended...Beach was pretty quite... it was September 😄 Great park...

We were given a credit for this park for Christmas and decided to use it for the first week of school holidays and what a great decision it was! We stayed in one of the waterfront villas and it was perfect for our needs. The beach was a short stroll away and a walking track takes you to the heart of town (approx 30mins). Some complained about the location as it’s about 2.5km out of town but we thought it was perfect out of the hustle and bustle of town. There was a kitchenette and a comfortable family/dining area and bedding for 2 adults and 2 kids. The park has a kitchen area with pizza ovens and BBQ facilities, a games and leisure area, unground heated swimming pool and a jumping/trampoline area for the kids. The villas were clean and comfortable and a great caravan park vibe. We cannot wait to come back again soon. Highly recommended.
Great value. Friendly and helpful staff

We stayed at an ensuite site in a quiet part of the caravan park. The staff were so helpful when we arrived and even helped by giving us the name of a fabulous restaurant. The ensuite was spotless with a huge shower. The washing machine and dryer in the laundry were very efficient.
A little disappointing
Stayed for one night. Great park. Friendly staff. Lots of activities for kids. Thanks
A really nice place.
Enjoyed our time there
Great place, friendly staff, easy access for BIG caravan and good price

Did not stay as pet friendly accommodation was not available on short notice. The receptionist, however, could not have been more helpful, offering advice on other accommodation in the area. We intend staying there at another time.
Great option for us - spacious, squeaky clean onsite van with water view.  Well appointed and thoughtful provisions.
Great place & walking distance to eateries.
Very well maintained park, booked a pet friendly 2 bedroom cabin, good size with balcony and had everything we needed for our stay, wouldn’t hesitate coming back!

Very well-maintained holiday park. We got ourselves a 2-bedroom cabin. It was a new one with a dishwasher, an oven and a microwave. The rooms are carpeted which is nice on winter. Very nice place, value for money.
We visited friends staying here and have stayed in this park ourselves.  Ist the BEST in Lakes Entrance!
Great caravan park stayed for 20 days in our caravan we opted for an onsuite sites the facilities were excellent and the staff were fantastic.
